description: This file defines a TemplateFactory class used for creating and managing HTML templates with configurable content, sanitization, and styling. It includes methods for content manipulation, sanitization, and rendering templates, and references external modules for DOM selection, configuration, sanitization, and utility functions.

classes.name: TemplateFactory
classes.description: A class for creating and managing HTML templates with configurable content, sanitization, and styling options.

methods.name: getContent
methods.description: Returns the current content entries, resolving any functions.

methods.name: hasContent
methods.description: Checks if there is any content available.

methods.name: changeContent
methods.description: Merges new content into the existing content configuration.

methods.name: toHtml
methods.description: Generates an HTML element based on the current template and content.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Performs type checking on the configuration object.

methods.name: _checkContent
methods.description: Validates the content entries for correct types.

methods.name: _setContent
methods.description: Sets the content of a specific element within the template based on selector.

methods.name: _maybeSanitize
methods.description: Sanitizes HTML content if sanitization is enabled.

methods.name: _resolvePossibleFunction
methods.description: Executes the argument if it is a function, otherwise returns it.

methods.name: _putElementInTemplate
methods.description: Inserts a DOM element into the template at the specified location.
